title: Engineering Mechanics （《工程力学》全英文）
description: For some international students, students under programs in English and other interested learners, this course will provide a clear and thorough picture of both the theory and application of the principles in theoretical mechanics (statics, kinematics and kinetics) and mechanics of materials. Let's study together and know more about the importance of mechanics in engineering application.

instructors.name: 刘刘;张强;水小平;刘广彦
